title: elaeocarpus sericoloides var. diffusus
intro: Elaeocarpus sericoloides var. diffusus is a plant species, commonly known as the 'Pandak Raya' or 'Red Bead Tree', native to Borneo and Malaysia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus sericoloides var. diffusus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. Elaeocarpus sericoloides var. diffusus is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
